description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 19, 2024 at 7:18 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Division Street at 9th Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling west on Division Street after having stopped at the stop sign at Vermont Street and was approaching the 
intersection with 9th Street when a passenger car approached from behind the Waymo AV, ran the stop sign at Vermont Street, and made 
contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. The front of the passenger car made continuous contact with the rear of the Waymo AV while both 
vehicles were still in motion for a short period of time before the passenger car slowed down and separated from the AV. The Waymo AV 
proceeded through the intersection with 9th Street and came to a stop on Division Street west of the intersection with 9th Street. The 
passenger car then accelerated and the front right corner of the passenger car made contact with the rear left corner of the stationary Waymo 
AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
